title: Series A Pitch — DocForge
tagline: Schema-first PDF generation for AI agents
problem: AI agents produce chat answers, but business workflows need polished PDF deliverables. Existing document tools optimize for human authors, not agent pipelines.
solution: DocForge provides validated JSON schemas, Typst templates, and a compile-preview-export workflow so agents produce board-ready PDFs without writing layout code.
market: $4.2B document automation TAM growing 18% YoY. Initial wedge: ops teams and AI-native startups shipping client-facing reports.
traction: $1.8M ARR, 140% net revenue retention, 42 enterprise design partners, and 3.2M documents compiled in the last 90 days.

team.name: Alex Morgan
team.bio: Former PM at Stripe; built document APIs at scale.

team.name: Jordan Lee
team.bio: Typst contributor; ex-infrastructure lead at Notion.

team.name: Sam Rivera
team.bio: Scaled B2B SaaS from $0 to $20M ARR at two startups.

ask.use_of_funds: Expand template marketplace, hire 6 engineers, and launch enterprise compliance exports (PDF/A, PDF/UA).
